title: If You Use Agent Zero, This Video is for You (EPIC FAIL)
summary: Jordan Urbs spent a day building an ad campaign using Agent Zero but encountered persistent LiteLLM errors that made the framework unusable. He documents the failures, workarounds, and ultimately recommends caution when committing real projects to AI agent frameworks without testing, suggesting Claude Code or OpenClaw as alternatives.
